title: bromus tectorum subsp. lucidus
intro: Bromus tectorum subsp. lucidus, also known as a subspecies of Cheatgrass, is a type of perennial grass that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Bromus tectorum subsp. lucidus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential antimicrobial and antiviral activities. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used to make a tincture or extract for its medicinal properties.
